dict.string: TheWatch needs your location to dispatch emergency responders and show nearby help.
TheWatch needs continuous location access to monitor your safety and dispatch responders even when the app is in the background.
TheWatch needs continuous location access to monitor your safety and dispatch responders even when the app is in the background.
TheWatch uses Face ID for quick, secure authentication.
TheWatch accesses your contacts to set up emergency contacts quickly.
TheWatch monitors health data to detect falls and medical emergencies.
TheWatch uses the microphone for emergency phrase detection and voice communication.
TheWatch uses on-device speech recognition to detect emergency phrases. Audio never leaves your device.
TheWatch uses the camera to capture evidence during emergencies.
